name: Build and Deploy NIXL LIBFABRIC Plugin from GitHub
description: Complete automated workflow: clone littlemex/nixl from GitHub, build LIBFABRIC plugin, upload to S3, and deploy to EC2 nodes. Fully reproducible on any machine with git, ninja, and aws CLI.

tasks.name: Check local prerequisites (git, ninja, g++, meson, aws)
commands: command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] git not found'; exit 1; }
command -v ninja >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] ninja not found. Install: apt-get install ninja-build'; exit 1; }
command -v g++ >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] g++ not found. Install: apt-get install build-essential'; exit 1; }
command -v meson >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] meson not found. Install: pip install meson'; exit 1; }
command -v aws >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] aws CLI not found'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Clone NIXL from GitHub or update if already exists
commands: if [ -d "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}/.git" ]; then echo '[INFO] NIXL repository exists, updating...'; cd "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}" && git fetch origin && git checkout ${NIXL_BRANCH} && git pull origin ${NIXL_BRANCH} && echo '[OK] Repository updated'; else echo '[INFO] Cloning NIXL from ${NIXL_REPO}...'; rm -rf "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}" && git clone "${NIXL_REPO}" "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}" && cd "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}" && git checkout ${NIXL_BRANCH} && echo '[OK] Repository cloned'; fi

tasks.name: Verify LIBFABRIC backend fix is present in source
commands: echo '[INFO] Verifying backend fix in source code...'
grep -n 'std::string conn_info_' "${PLUGIN_SRC}/libfabric_backend.h" || { echo '[ERROR] conn_info_ member not found'; exit 1; }
grep -A3 'getConnInfo.*const' "${PLUGIN_SRC}/libfabric_backend.cpp" | grep -q 'str = conn_info_' || { echo '[ERROR] cached getConnInfo not found'; exit 1; }
grep -q 'serializeConnectionInfo.*conn_info_' "${PLUGIN_SRC}/libfabric_backend.cpp" || { echo '[ERROR] constructor serialization not found'; exit 1; }
echo '[OK] Backend fix verified in source'

tasks.name: Setup meson build directory (idempotent)
commands: test -f "${BUILD_SUBDIR}/build.ninja" || { echo '[ERROR] meson setup failed'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Build LIBFABRIC plugin with ninja
commands: if [ $BUILD_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo '[ERROR] Build failed'; exit 1; fi

tasks.name: Verify build artifact (size, timestamp, ELF format)
commands: test -f "${PLUGIN_PATH}" || { echo '[ERROR] Plugin not found at ${PLUGIN_PATH}'; exit 1; }
file "${PLUGIN_PATH}" | grep -q 'ELF.*shared object' || { echo '[ERROR] Not a valid ELF shared object'; exit 1; }
if [ $SO_SIZE_KB -lt 100 ]; then echo '[WARN] Artifact unusually small (<100 KB)'; fi
if [ $SO_SIZE_KB -gt 10000 ]; then echo '[WARN] Artifact unusually large (>10 MB)'; fi

tasks.name: Verify exported symbols
commands: nm "${PLUGIN_PATH}" 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'nixlLibfabricEngine' | xargs -I{} echo '[OK] nixlLibfabricEngine references: {}'

tasks.name: Upload plugin to S3
commands: aws s3 ls "s3://${S3_BUCKET}/${S3_PLUGIN_KEY}" --region ${AWS_REGION} || { echo '[ERROR] S3 upload verification failed'; exit 1; }
echo "[INFO] S3 size: ${S3_SIZE} bytes, Local size: ${LOCAL_SIZE} bytes"
if [ "${S3_SIZE}" -eq "${LOCAL_SIZE}" ]; then echo '[OK] Size verification passed'; else echo '[ERROR] Size mismatch'; exit 1; fi

tasks.name: Verify SSH connectivity to both nodes
commands: ssh -i "${SSH_KEY}" -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ${REMOTE_USER}@${NODE1_PUBLIC_IP} 'echo [OK] Node1 reachable' || { echo '[ERROR] Cannot SSH to Node1'; exit 1; }
ssh -i "${SSH_KEY}" -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ${REMOTE_USER}@${NODE2_PUBLIC_IP} 'echo [OK] Node2 reachable' || { echo '[ERROR] Cannot SSH to Node2'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Deploy plugin to Node1 from S3
commands: cp "${REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}/${REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}" "${REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}/${REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}.original" 2>/dev/null || echo '[INFO] No existing plugin to backup'

python3 -c 'from nixl._api import nixl_agent, nixl_agent_config; import uuid; cfg = nixl_agent_config(); agent = nixl_agent(str(uuid.uuid4()), cfg); plugins = agent.get_plugin_list(); assert "LIBFABRIC" in plugins' || { echo '[ERROR] NIXL cannot load LIBFABRIC plugin'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Deploy plugin to Node2 from S3
commands: cp "${REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}/${REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}" "${REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}/${REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}.original" 2>/dev/null || echo '[INFO] No existing plugin to backup'

python3 -c 'from nixl._api import nixl_agent, nixl_agent_config; import uuid; cfg = nixl_agent_config(); agent = nixl_agent(str(uuid.uuid4()), cfg); plugins = agent.get_plugin_list(); assert "LIBFABRIC" in plugins' || { echo '[ERROR] NIXL cannot load LIBFABRIC plugin'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Verify deployment on both nodes
commands: echo '[INFO] Verifying deployment on both nodes...'
if [ "${NODE1_MD5}" = "${LOCAL_MD5}" ] && [ "${NODE2_MD5}" = "${LOCAL_MD5}" ]; then echo '[OK] All MD5 hashes match'; else echo '[ERROR] MD5 mismatch detected'; exit 1; fi

tasks.name: Display deployment summary
commands: echo '  1. Restart vLLM services on both nodes'
echo '  2. Check logs for "Backend LIBFABRIC was instantiated"'
